ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the stock exchange operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the dividend belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was announced */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date by which an investor must be a shareholder to receive the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the split belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the split is officially recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "illiq" (
  "illiq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each illiq record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the illiq value belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the illiq value was calculated */,
  "illiq_value" REAL /* Illiq value of the stock on the given date */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the date the illiq value was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("illiq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_illiq_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
